excerpt: In this post, we show how to train robot policies for the Unitree H1 humanoid with NVIDIA Isaac Lab on Amazon SageMaker AI across two compute options: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod and Amazon SageMaker Training Jobs.
summary_hint: In this post, we show how to train robot policies for the Unitree H1 humanoid with NVIDIA Isaac Lab on Amazon SageMaker AI across two compute options: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod and Amazon SageMaker Training Jobs.
title: Scale Robot Reinforcement Learning with NVIDIA Isaac Lab on Amazon SageMaker AI
